parts.answer: 2 May/June 2025 Question Answer Marks all temperatures and temperature changes recorded to 1 dp 1 all five highest temperatures recorded correctly (27.0, 29.0, 30.5, 32.5, 35.5) 1 all temperature changes calculated correctly (4.5, 6.5, 8.0, 10.5, 13.5) 1 all points plotted correctly 2 best fit line 1 correct reading from their extrapolation at 45 1 °C 1 twice as much lithium chloride dissolved / used (so twice as much energy given out) 1 less heat loss (to the surroundings) 1 May/June 2025 Question Answer Marks excess: no (further) change / precipitate remains / green precipitate / insoluble 1

does not contain ammonium / NH4 + ions / not ammonium / NH4 + + nitrate / NO3 – KNO3 = 2 Question Answer Marks 4 1 mark for any 6 of: • 100 cm of water measured using suitable apparatus and placed into a suitable container • water is heated to 50 °C • water is maintained at this temperature • magnesium sulfate is added in excess or in portions until no more dissolves • the mixture is stirred • the solution is filtered to remove undissolved magnesium sulfate or the mass used is known • the use of appropriate measurements to calculate the solubility.
